expected.notes: Hand-corrected fixture. Original LLM case used end_date='2025-09-15' assuming a mid-2025 runtime, but actual runtime is 2026+ so the date was in the past and the rule fired unexpectedly. Fixed by using an end_date two years in the future, well outside the 60-day threshold. The rule will not fire regardless of when this case is evaluated.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'program_end_approaching', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - extraction_a.end_date lt 60_days_from_now
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
